message:
refactor(app): extract model selection helpers and improve deferred restore warnings

Extracts three large inline code blocks from run() in main.rs into
dedicated functions, reducing the monolithic function's complexity:

- reload_model_registry_with_extra_entries(): reloads ModelRegistry
  from disk and merges extension-contributed model entries
- resolve_selection_with_auth(): the full model-selection + API-key
  resolution loop including first-time setup prompts and SAP AI Core
  token exchange, previously duplicated inline
- build_extension_bootstrap_selection(): creates a minimal ModelSelection
  for extension loading when the user's chosen model isn't resolved yet
- context_window_tokens_for_entry(): safely extracts context window
  from a ModelEntry with a fallback when the model reports 0
- should_retry_selection_after_extensions(): determines whether a
  failed model selection should be retried after extensions load
  (only when extensions might contribute the requested model)

Also improves the deferred restore warning flow in app.rs:
- RestoreResult gains deferred_warning field for cases where the restore
  fails but no immediate fallback is available yet
- select_model_and_thinking() now carries deferred_restore_warning
  through all fallback paths, appending the eventual fallback model
  info when one is selected later
- Prevents fallback_message from being overwritten when it's already
  set (e.g., from a deferred warning that was resolved earlier)

agent.rs: adds set_compaction_context_window() const fn setter so
main.rs can configure the compaction window after model selection
without directly accessing the internal compaction_settings field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
